description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pytest that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12) with different dependency installation options, excluding certain combinations. For each matrix entry, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies, run pytest with coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codecov using the CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
